breaking.title: 2 Killed, 3 Injured As Part Of House Collapses Amid Rains In Indore
breaking.summary: The accident occurred at Khatamba village

breaking.title: Watch: Eight arrested over Ram temple donations scandal | Above the Fold | 26.06.2026
breaking.summary: From arrests over the alleged embezzlement of Ram temple donations and a standoff between Nihang Sikhs and the police in Uttarakhand, to the release of the names of servicemen who died during Operation Sindoor, the rising death toll from Venezuela’s earthquakes, revised fuel prices, higher Apple product prices, FIFA highlights, and more.

breaking.title: IMO pauses its Gulf vessel evacuation plan after Iran attacks ship
breaking.summary: The attack followed a joint declaration by the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) states, including Oman, after a meeting attended by the United States, stating that there should be no “tolls, fees, or attempts to assert control over the strait.”

breaking.title: Russia-annexed Crimea declares ‘emergency’ amid Ukraine strikes
breaking.summary: The announcement comes amid fuel shortages and power cuts triggered by the Ukrainian attacks on logistics chains and oil facilities across Crimea, the rest of Russian-occupied Ukraine and southern Russia.

breaking.title: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
breaking.summary: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 589 people.

breaking.title: Soldier Killed, 2 Injured After Army Truck Skids Of Highway In Arunachal Pradesh
breaking.summary: The two surviving personnel are currently undergoing treatment at the District Hospital

breaking.title: What we know so far
breaking.summary: The quakes killed at least 589 people and injured more than 2,980, with more feared trapped under rubble.

breaking.title: False alarm: Dubai residents receive missile alert, told to 'disregard' it minutes later
breaking.summary: Dubai residents were briefly alarmed by a missile alert on Friday, only for authorities to quickly retract the warning, urging them to disregard it. This marks the first such alert since the Iran war's ceasefire. The UAE's Foreign Minister later spoke with his Iranian counterpart, emphasizing diplomatic dialogue for regional stability amidst ongoing peace deal negotiations.
